snippets.title: POST to an LLM API with error checking
snippets.explanation: Headers carry the key and content type; res.ok guards against HTTP errors fetch won't reject on.

snippets.title: Timeout with AbortController
snippets.explanation: abort() cancels the request after the deadline; the await throws an AbortError you can catch.

snippets.title: Reading a streamed response
snippets.explanation: Reading response.body chunk-by-chunk enables live token streaming instead of waiting for the full body.
